violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as raw sausage and calamari) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as tomatoes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2023

Cheese, Vegan Pepperoni, Cooked Mushrooms were observed held at 47-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were voluntarily disposed by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2023

Recently prepared cooked sausage, cooked chicken and onions were observed placed in hotel pans in prep units. Sausage and onions were placed in the freezer to blast chill and chicken was reheated to be hot held. Cooling methods and guidance reviewed with owner. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2023

The cutting boards on the cookline are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door freezer (ice accumulation) and prep units on the cookline have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
Several ceiling tiles were observed in poor repair in back prep area. Physical Facilities to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
